Package com.glisterbyte.singingmonsters.main.monster.eggbox

Interface ReadableEggBoxMonster

All Superinterfaces:
HasClient, HasSfsData, Positioned, ReadableMonster
All Known Implementing Classes:
EggBoxMonster, UnownedEggBoxMonster
public interface ReadableEggBoxMonster extends ReadableMonster
